title: ERCOT Real Time Adders JSON API
description:
The Real-Time Reliability Deployment Price Adders (RTRDPAs) for energy and each ancillary service, for each SCED run in ERCOT.

This dataset also includes:
* System Lambda (λ), which is the Shadow Price for the system-wide Power Balance constraint
* Total RUC/RMR Low Dispatch Limit (LDL) relaxed
* Deployed Load Resource MWs that are added to Demand
* Energy Storage Resource Charging MWs that are added to Demand
* Total Low Sustained Limit (LSL)
* Total High Sustained Limit (HSL)

This dataset was implemented on December 5th, 2025, as part of ERCOT's RTC+B project, which modified many existing datasets related to ancillary services and system capacity while also introducing new reports.
